avenues.name: First to loop — the venue
avenues.thesis: Every loop ingredient already exists at the defect/materials-qubit venue — ML-steered synthesis, feedback-stop defect writing, 4 K operation — and nowhere else has the full set. The author's venue bet, conditional on Chapter 2's loop bet resolving true.
avenues.signpost: conditional on a loop-credited, adopted advance by 2031 (the Chapter 2 card, 65%): the first venue is defect/materials qubits; scored when and if that bet resolves

avenues.name: The defect loop, demonstrated
avenues.thesis: Yield loops are the near case: the decide-half (Bayesian synthesis steering) and the make-step's own feedback (fluorescence-triggered defect writing) need only joining. Coherence-grade loops inherit the cruel-reward problem in full.
avenues.signpost: a published, independently verifiable autonomous closed loop iterating a defect-qubit figure of merit (creation yield, coherence, or charge stability) over 3+ unattended cycles, by 2030-12-31

avenues.name: The loop feeds the incumbent
avenues.thesis: Superconducting losses are materials problems (TLS, junction disorder); tantalum-for-niobium already tripled coherence. A synthesis loop can crown the incumbent without ever touching a processor — if attribution clears, which history says is the hard part.
avenues.signpost: a loop-discovered materials improvement adopted on a flagship superconducting chip, credited as loop-discovered, by 2032-12-31

avenues.name: Portfolio: neutral atoms
avenues.thesis: The deepest peer-reviewed logical-qubit floor: 96 logical from 448 atoms below threshold, all-logical magic-state distillation, on the 48-logical lineage. ENTRY: Magne customer-operational at 40+ logical by 2027-06-30, or any neutral-atom system at 100+ logical by 2027-12-31. EXIT: neither by 2028-12-31.
avenues.signpost: ENTRY/EXIT dates above, scored in later editions; a deliberate six-month slip allowance over vendor claims

avenues.name: Portfolio: trapped ions
avenues.thesis: The most impressive raw numbers — 94 detected / 48 corrected logical from 98 ions, four-nines gates — currently ride on company preprints and an R&D prototype. ENTRY: iceberg result peer-published AND the promised 256-qubit system demonstrated, both by 2027-06-30. EXIT: four-nines still confined to prototypes (no customer system) by 2028-12-31.
avenues.signpost: ENTRY/EXIT dates above; the evidence-grade gap, not the numbers, is what the card tracks

avenues.name: Portfolio: superconducting
avenues.thesis: The incumbent keeps the only peer-reviewed below-threshold memory and the deepest industrial base; its ceiling is a materials wall this chapter's half-bet targets. ENTRY: a peer-reviewed below-threshold result at distance 9+, or a logical memory at 1e-5 error, by 2027-12-31. EXIT: no larger-distance below-threshold result anywhere by 2028-12-31.
avenues.signpost: ENTRY/EXIT dates above; one Google-cadence step, not a leap

avenues.name: Portfolio: bosonic
avenues.thesis: Concatenated cat-qubit error correction is on a chip and below threshold for phase flips — the industrial continuation of this dossier's Chapter 1 floor. ENTRY: a multi-logical-qubit bosonic device demonstrating logical OPERATIONS (not just memory) beyond break-even by 2028-12-31. EXIT: cat/GKP scaling still single-digit by 2029-12-31.
avenues.signpost: ENTRY/EXIT dates above; the dark horse this dossier watches by lineage

avenues.name: Portfolio: Majorana
avenues.thesis: The claimed readout is published; the published critique argues its diagnostic is unreliable; the Reply is published; the existence question stands open. No loop closes on a reward whose interpretation is disputed.
avenues.signpost: ENTRY only on independent reproduction resolving the published critique; the EXIT flag is already armed, unchanged from Chapter 2

avenues.name: The reauthorization clock
avenues.thesis: Unanimous Senate committee, bipartisan House committee, unified industry, the outcompete-China frame — against a midterm floor calendar, unresolved chamber differences, and the prior Congress's identical bill dying of schedule. Secondary line: 75% by 2027-12-31 allowing a fast reintroduction.
avenues.signpost: NQI reauthorization (S.3597 / H.R.8462 or successor) enacted by 2027-01-03, the end of the 119th Congress

avenues.name: The loop layer at the park
avenues.thesis: The allied Hefei answer already broke ground — IQMP has the co-location, the cryoplant, the proving ground, the tenants. What no public document funds is the loop layer: autonomous experimentation, probers, robotic synthesis, active-learning stacks as first-class deliverables. Saying that out loud is this dossier's distinctive ask.
avenues.signpost: loop infrastructure funded as a named deliverable (program line, RFP, or facility plan) at IQMP or an equivalent allied co-located site by 2028-12-31

checks._comment: Single source of truth for the consistency-check RULES. Both index.html's console and verification/verify_numbers.py read these, so a threshold can never drift between the page and the verifier. Change a rule HERE and both sides enforce it on next run. (The check LOGIC is still written in each language — see AUTHORING.md — but the rules it enforces live only here.)
